title: Destination Gear 6ft Whiskey Brown Palapa Tiki Umbrella for Patio Tilt Shade
description:
Bring the island vibe straight to your backyard with the Destination Gear 6ft Whiskey Brown Palapa Tiki Umbrella. Designed for both style and durability, this tropical-inspired umbrella features a sturdy aluminum push-up frame and a generous 6-foot canopy to keep you cool and shaded on sunny days. The realistic palapa-style cover is made from long-lasting, UV-resistant polypropylene that maintains its rich color season after season.

Destination Gear 6ft Whiskey Brown Palapa Tiki Umbrella for Patio Tilt Shade

Bring the island vibe straight to your backyard with the Destination Gear 6ft Whiskey Brown Palapa Tiki Umbrella. Designed for both style and durability, this tropical-inspired umbrella features a sturdy aluminum push-up frame and a generous 6-foot canopy to keep you cool and shaded on sunny days. The realistic palapa-style cover is made from long-lasting, UV-resistant polypropylene that maintains its rich color season after season.

Key Features

  • TROPICAL PALAPA DESIGN - Instantly elevate your outdoor space with a stylish tiki-inspired umbrella, perfect for patios, pools, beaches, and backyard gatherings
  • DURABLE ALUMINUM FRAME - Lightweight yet strong push-up frame provides reliable support and easy setup for everyday use
  • 6 FOOT SHADE COVERAGE - Generous canopy size delivers ample sun protection while keeping your seating area cool and comfortable
  • 3 POSITION TILT FUNCTION - Easily adjust the umbrella angle to block sunlight from multiple directions throughout the day
  • UV RESISTANT POLYPROPYLENE CANOPY - Long-lasting, fade-resistant material maintains its rich whiskey brown color season after season

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 6TPU-257
  • UPC: 699192985303
  • Color: Brown

Whether you're relaxing poolside, hosting a backyard luau, or enjoying a beach day, the convenient 3-position tilt lets you easily adjust your shade throughout the day. Built for performance and designed for atmosphere, this tiki umbrella is the perfect blend of function and island flair.
